commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review; there is no narrow automated repair task because the patch itself looks coherent.; Cleared: The diff only changes Telegram polling session code and tests; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, secrets, package scripts, or other supply-chain surfaces. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a parent-side Telegram polling liveness tracker and watchdog to isolated ingress, plus regression tests for stall restart, healthy polling, and custom threshold behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main defaults Telegram polling to isolated ingress and stores pollingStallThresholdMs, but only the non-isolated polling cycle consults it. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review; there is no narrow automated repair task because the patch itself looks coherent.

target.title: fix(telegram): honor pollingStallThresholdMs in isolated ingress mode
target.body:
## Summary

The configured `pollingStallThresholdMs` was only consulted in the non-isolated polling cycle (`#runPollingCycle`). The isolated ingress path ã which has been the default since 2026.5.12 ã had no watchdog, so a wedged worker would never trigger a restart regardless of the configured threshold.

## Root Cause

`TelegramPollingSession` stores `#stallThresholdMs` at construction (line 234) but only references it at line 903 inside `#runPollingCycle`. The `#runIsolatedIngressCycle` path (line 661) receives `poll-start`, `poll-success`, and `poll-error` messages from the worker but never feeds them to a liveness tracker or checks for staleness.

## Fix

Add a parent-side `TelegramPollingLivenessTracker` to `#runIsolatedIngressCycle()` that:

1. Feeds on existing worker `poll-start`/`poll-success`/`poll-error` messages
2. Runs a `POLL_WATCHDOG_INTERVAL_MS` interval that calls `detectStall({ thresholdMs })`
3. On stall: marks transport dirty, sets `restartRequested`, logs, and stops the worker
4. Cleans up the watchdog in the `finally` block

This mirrors the existing stall detection in `#runPollingCycle` (lines 897ã923) and reuses the same `TelegramPollingLivenessTracker` class and `POLL_WATCHDOG_INTERVAL_MS` constant.

## Tests

3 new tests in `polling-session.test.ts`:
- Stall detection fires when worker sends no messages
- Healthy polling does not trigger false restart
- Custom `stallThresholdMs` value is honored in isolated mode

All 45 existing + new polling session tests pass.

Fixes #83950
target.author: jerry-xin
